message:
🐛 Add deploy event logs via kubectlProxy in agent polling path (#344)

The agent path fetched deployment status but not K8s events, so the
Deploy Events panel was empty for clusters polled via the agent. Now
uses kubectlProxy.exec to fetch events from the namespace and filters
for the deployment and its ReplicaSets/Pods (name prefix match).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
